phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate QR codes?
phrases.text_local: Onde valido o código QR da entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih vuh-LEE-doo AW KAW-dee-goo KEHEHRR DUH ayngt-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: QR validation is standard at Portuguese attraction entry points for efficiency.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the ticket counter upon entry.

responses.english: Good morning, at the ticket counter upon entry.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira à entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate QR codes?
phrases.cultural_note: A validação de QR code é necessária para aceder ao museu com bilhete digital.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the ticket desk at the entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, at the ticket desk at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira à entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde está a Bola de Ouro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH BAW-luh DIH OHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: A Bola de Ouro original de 2008 está em exposição no museu.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na sala dos troféus.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the trophy room.

responses.english: Good morning, in the trophy room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH.
responses.local: Bom dia, na sala dos troféus.

phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museum staff typically give concise spatial directions without extra elaboration.

likely_response.translation_en: It is in the Trophy Room.

responses.english: It is in the Trophy Room.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sporting CP zone is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a zona do Sporting CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ZOH-nuh DOO SPAWR-teeng seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Themed zones are clearly demarcated by floor sections in Portuguese museums.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um monitor de sala.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH SAH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or a room monitor.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or a room monitor.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH SAH-luh.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um monitor de sala.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Loja Oficial CR7?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee FEE-kah ah LOH-zhah oh-fee-see-AHL say-EE-oh SEE-teh

likely_response.local: A Loja Oficial CR7 fica na entrada, junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LAW-zhuh aw-fee-SEEAHL SEHEHRR SEH-tih FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh, ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: The CR7 Official Store is at the entrance, next to the ticket office.

responses.english: The CR7 Official Store is at the entrance, next to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: AH LAW-zhuh aw-fee-SEEAHL SEHEHRR SEH-tih FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh, ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: A Loja Oficial CR7 fica na entrada, junto à bilheteira.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Troféus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Troféus.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Trophy Room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Trophy Room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Troféus.

phrases.cultural_note: A loja oficial vende produtos licenciados do CR7, incluindo camisolas e souvenirs.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Loja Oficial CR7.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LAW-zhuh aw-fee-SEEAHL SEHEHRR SEH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CR7 Official Store.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CR7 Official Store.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LAW-zhuh aw-fee-SEEAHL SEHEHRR SEH-tih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Loja Oficial CR7.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Trophy Room is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a Sala dos Troféus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Museums in Madeira rely on clear internal signage for room navigation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga a sinalização interna.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN een-TEH-ruh-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the internal signage.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the internal signage.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN een-TEH-ruh-nuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga a sinalização interna.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the original Ballon d'Or is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a Bola de Ouro original?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH BAW-luh DIH OHW-roo aw-ree-zhee-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Exhibits are arranged chronologically, with signature highlights positioned at the end.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no final do percurso.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO fee-NAHL DOO peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the end of the route.

responses.english: Good morning, at the end of the route.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO fee-NAHL DOO peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo.
responses.local: Bom dia, no final do percurso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sporting CP zone is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a zona do Sporting CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ZOH-nuh DOO SPAWR-teeng seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: A zona Sporting CP mostra a carreira de Ronaldo no clube lisboeta.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Zona Sporting CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh SPAWR-teeng seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sporting CP zone.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sporting CP zone.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh SPAWR-teeng seh-PEH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Zona Sporting CP.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the official CR7 store is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja oficial do CR7?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah LOH-zhah oh-fee-SYAH-oo doo SEH-eh-REE-SEH-chee? (liaison: FEE-kah-ah)
phrases.cultural_note: Museum shops in Portugal are typically positioned at the exit flow for convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à saída do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the museum exit.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the museum exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto à saída do museu.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Troféus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH troo-FEHOOSH?
phrases.cultural_note: The trophy room displays CR7's major awards, including his Ballon d'Or. Visitors often ask for directions upon arrival.

likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, to the right.

responses.english: On the first floor, to the right.
